label: Industrial Pak
blurb: Manufacturing, IoT & Factory Operations. Uptime, yield optimization, and supply chain resilience.

skills.label: Hazardous Material Sds Updater
skills.method: Scans incoming chemical shipments, updates the digital Safety Data Sheet (SDS) binder, and prints OSHA-compliant warning labels.
trigger_examples: bulletproofs the facility against safety audits

skills.label: Qa Defect Vision Classifier
skills.method: Continuously updates localized computer vision models using daily photos of rejected parts on the assembly line.
trigger_examples: automates and scales visual quality assurance

skills.label: Predictive Maintenance Scheduler
skills.method: Ingests vibration and heat telemetry from CNC machines, scheduling maintenance 48 hours before predicted bearing failure.

skills.label: Tooling Lifecycle Tracker
skills.method: Counts how many times an injection mold or drill bit has been used, automatically ordering a replacement before the mold degrades.

skills.label: Scrap Rate Root Cause Analyzer
skills.method: Correlates a sudden spike in defective parts with environmental data (e.g., factory humidity) or a specific supplier's recent batch.
trigger_examples: solves manufacturing mysteries before they burn cash

skills.label: Bill Of Materials Cost Optimizer
skills.method: Analyzes BOMs against global spot prices for raw materials, suggesting cheaper substitute components that meet the same engineering specs.

skills.label: Energy Peak Shaving Throttle
skills.method: Briefly powers down non-essential heavy machinery during utility peak pricing hours to avoid massive demand charges.

skills.label: Oee Dashboard Generator
skills.method: Pulls SCADA system data to calculate and display Overall Equipment Effectiveness (Availability x Performance x Quality) in real-time.
trigger_examples: gives plant managers a single source of truth

skills.label: Just In Time Pallet Router
skills.method: Directs autonomous forklifts to move raw materials from the dock to the exact assembly station exactly 10 minutes before they are needed.
trigger_examples: eliminates floor clutter and waiting time
